npcs.name: Dorikhan Caine
npcs.role: Desert tracker with old Autark leanings
npcs.territory: Gravel service roads skirting the Salt River dry beds
npcs.reputation: Keeps uneasy truces with Garou, leaves cairn-warnings mortals miss
npcs.story_function: Broker for passage through Garou-shadowed stretches; tests whether PCs honor taboos

npcs.name: Jebadiah Walker
npcs.alignment: Independent, sells routes to any who pay
npcs.territory: I-10 fuel stops and motel lots west of Phoenix
npcs.reputation: Drives through dust storms on instinct; never breaks a contracted delivery window
npcs.story_function: Offers transport with tight conditions; can disappear mid-run if trust is broken

npcs.name: Joanna
npcs.role: Newly Embraced lookout placed on canal bridges
npcs.territory: Canal overpasses near Sky Harbor’s eastern edge
npcs.reputation: Silent observer with a radio and a flashlight code; knows which nights the sand hums
npcs.story_function: Early-warning asset who must choose between selling intel or proving loyalty

npcs.name: Randall Mckab
npcs.alignment: Independent with grudging respect for Camarilla praxis
npcs.territory: Black Canyon Highway frontage roads and arroyo crossings
npcs.reputation: Laughs off threats, enforces lines with sudden violence after long patience
npcs.story_function: Stops trespassers at posted cairns; demands reparations when lines are crossed

npcs.name: Tony the Prince's Bodyguard
npcs.alignment: Independent but honors old Prince-era markers
npcs.territory: City-side checkpoints along the Loop where the lights thin
npcs.reputation: Disciplined, radio-connected, still runs extraction drills after the Prince’s murder
npcs.story_function: Offers disciplined escort or blocks pursuit; tests whether PCs respect old accords

npcs.name: Marta "Switchback" Ortiz
npcs.role: Desert scout who maps safe pull-offs and dry washes
npcs.alignment: Leans Anarch but obeys survival rules first
npcs.territory: Service tracks north of Mesa and isolated rest areas
npcs.reputation: Marks safe gravel lots with oil stains; vanishes when mortals linger
npcs.story_function: Guides or strands travelers based on payment and respect for her markers

npcs.name: Lewis "Canal Rat" Merrow
npcs.role: Canal runner who ferries messages by small boat at night
npcs.alignment: Quiet Camarilla sympathizer for steady pay
npcs.reputation: Moves unseen where asphalt ends; hates gunfire near water
npcs.story_function: Delivers covert packages; drags PCs into disputes when canals become contested routes
